title: ธนาคารกรุงเทพ BBL แอปฯ กลับมาใช้งานได้ตามปกติแล้ว หลังระบบแจ้งเกิดความขัดข้อง

summary_cn: 曼谷银行（BBL）的手机应用程序在今早系统出现故障后已恢复正常运行。该银行今日上午发布更新，确认应用目前可以正常使用，用户可以继续进行日常金融交易和账户操作。

title_cn: 6月4日泰国金价报价，下跌50泰铢，黄金首饰价格为每克69,950泰铢
summary_cn: 2026年6月4日，泰国黄金价格最新报价出炉。黄金条块价格为每克69,150泰铢，黄金首饰价格为每克69,950泰铢，1斯隆黄金价格为17,288泰铢，较前日下跌50泰铢。价格依照泰国金商协会最新公布的数据更新。

title: รัฐบาลกางแผนรับมือฤดูฝน สั่งกรมปศุสัตว์ทำแผนอพยพสัตว์เลี้ยง รับสถานการณ์น้ำท่วมฉับพลัน
desc: รองโฆษกรัฐบาลเผย รัฐบาลกางแผนรับมือฤดูฝน สั่งกรมปศุสัตว์ทำแผนอพยพสัตว์เลี้ยงของเกษตรกร รองรับสถานการณ์น้ำท่วมฉับพลัน พร้อมเตือนเฝ้าระวังโรคระบาดช่วงน้ำท่วม
title_cn: 政府部署雨季防控计划，指示畜牧部门制定动物应急疏散方案
summary_cn: 泰国政府发布雨季应对方案，要求畜牧部门制定农民饲养动物的应急疏散计划，以应对突发洪灾。政府强调需要关注洪水期间可能出现的疾病传播风险，做好防疫预案，确保农业和公众卫生安全。
desc_original: รองโฆษกรัฐบาลเผย รัฐบาลกางแผนรับมือฤดูฝน สั่งกรมปศุสัตว์ทำแผนอพยพสัตว์เลี้ยงของเกษตรกร รองรับสถานการณ์น้ำท่วมฉับพลัน พร้อมเตือนเฝ้าระวังโรคระบาดช่วงน้ำท่วม

desc: โครงการบัตรสวัสดิการแห่งรัฐ 2569 บัตรคนจน "คนไม่มีสมาร์ทโฟน" ลงทะเบียนได้ที่ไหน เช็กพิกัดหน่วยลงทะเบียนใกล้บ้าน "ผู้พิการ สูงอายุ ป่วยติดเตียง เดินทางเองไม่ได้" ต้องลงทะเบียนยังไง
title_cn: 2026年国家福利卡计划，无智能手机人群登记指南
summary_cn: 泰国2026年国家福利卡计划为无智能手机的贫困人群提供注册途径。用户可查找距离住所最近的登记点申请，行动不便的残疾人、高龄老人和卧床病人可获得上门或特殊登记服务，确保所有贫困群体都能受惠于该项国家福利。

title: ดราม่าป้ายทะเบียนใหม่รถอีวี
desc: ป้ายทะเบียนพื้นหลังสีฟ้าสะท้อนแสง สำหรับรถ BEV หรือรถไฟฟ้า 100% เมื่อกรมการขนส่งทางบก (ขบ.) เปิดตัวร่างกฎกระทรวงฉบับใหม่เรื่องป้ายทะเบียนรถยนต์ไฟฟ้า (สีฟ้า) ก็มีทั้งเห็นด้วยและไม่เห็นด้วย!
title_cn: 电动车新牌照引发争议，蓝色底板设计众议纷纷
summary_cn: 泰国陆运局推出新版电动车车牌样式，采用蓝色反光底板，专为100% BEV 纯电动汽车设计。新规遭到社会各界不同反应，既有支持者也有质疑者。此举旨在便于区分电动车与传统车辆，但引发了关于牌照设计必要性和实施细节的广泛讨论。
desc_original: ป้ายทะเบียนพื้นหลังสีฟ้าสะท้อนแสง สำหรับรถ BEV หรือรถไฟฟ้า 100% เมื่อกรมการขนส่งทางบก (ขบ.) เปิดตัวร่างกฎกระทรวงฉบับใหม่เรื่องป้ายทะเบียนรถยนต์ไฟฟ้า (สีฟ้า) ก็มีทั้งเห็นด้วยและไม่เห็นด้วย!

title: Banquet honours Queen's birthday
desc: The government will host a state banquet today (Thursday) to mark Her Majesty the Queen's 48th birthday celebrations.
title_cn: 政府举办国宴庆祝皇后48岁寿诞
summary_cn: 泰国政府今日将举办国宴，庆祝皇后陛下的48岁寿辰。作为泰国皇室的重要活动，此次盛宴汇聚政府高层和社会各界人士，彰显对皇室的敬意和祝贺。
desc_original: The government will host a state banquet today (Thursday) to mark Her Majesty the Queen's 48th birthday celebrations.

title: เปิดภาพ "สัตว์ป่าหายาก" จากกล้องดักถ่าย สะท้อนความสมบูรณ์ของผืนป่าแก่งกระจาน
desc: "อุทยานแห่งชาติแก่งกระจาน" พบความอุดมสมบูรณ์ของผืนป่าและสัตว์ป่าหายาก พร้อมเดินหน้าเฝ้าระวัง "จระเข้น้ำจืด" อย่างต่อเนื่อง
title_cn: 红外相机捕捉珍稀野生动物 甘查让公园生态完整性得到验证
summary_cn: 甘查让国家公园采用红外相机等现代监测技术，发现了丰富的森林生态资源和众多珍稀野生动物，充分展现该保护区的生物多样性。公园将继续推进淡水鳄等濒危物种的长期监测和保护工作，为区域生态文明建设做出贡献。

title: SGP anticipates over 10% sales growth
desc: Siam Gas and Petrochemicals Plc (SGP), Thailand's second-largest liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) trader by volume, expects sales to grow by at least 10.5% year-on-year to 3.5 million tonnes in 2026 despite sharp increases in global LPG prices triggered by Middle East tensions.
title_cn: 泰国液化气商SGP预期2026年销售增长超10%
summary_cn: 泰国第二大液化石油气贸易商暹罗气体与石化公司（Siam Gas and Petrochemicals）预计2026年销售额将同比增长至少10.5%，达到350万吨，并将继续拓展市场份额。尽管中东地区局势紧张导致全球液化气价格大幅上升，该公司仍看好长期业务前景。
desc_original: Siam Gas and Petrochemicals Plc (SGP), Thailand's second-largest liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) trader by volume, expects sales to grow by at least 10.5% year-on-year to 3.5 million tonnes in 2026 despite sharp increases in global LPG prices triggered by Middle East tensions.

title_cn: 2026年6月4日泰国油价最新报价
summary_cn: 本日泰国汽油、气油、柴油等各类燃油价格公布。报价涵盖PTT、中石油、Caltex、Susco、Shell等主要加油站品牌的汽油、气油、柴油等常见燃油品种，每升以泰铢结算。油价变化对日常出行、物流成本均有直接影响。驾驶人士和物流企业可参考该信息制定出行和采购计划，合理安排燃油预算。

title: ผู้ว่าธปท.ยันคงดอกเบี้ยยาวถึงสิ้นปี เร่งหาวิธีสกัดหนี้ท่วม“คนไทยซื้อก่อน-ผ่อนไม่ไหว”
desc: “วิทัย”ย้ำพันธกิจ 8 เดือนในตำแหน่งผู้ว่า ธปท งานหลักยังดูแลคุมเงินเฟ้อ ช่วยประคองเศรษฐกิจคงดอกเบี้ยยาวสิ้นปี เร่งแก้ปัญหาโครงสร้าง คุมสินเเชื่อ BNPL แก้ลำคนไทยใช้แต่ไม่ผ่อน สกัดหนี้เสียพุ่ง
title_cn: 泰国央行确认利率政策维持到年底 加强债务风险管控
summary_cn: 泰国央行行长在履职8个月后确认，将继续维持长期利率政策至2026年底以控制物价。同时央行强化对先买后付（BNPL）等消费贷款产品的监管，防止家庭债务激增。央行将进一步推进结构性改革，遏制「泰国人先买后付但还不起」的债务困局，减少不良资产风险，保护金融系统稳定性。
desc_original: “วิทัย”ย้ำพันธกิจ 8 เดือนในตำแหน่งผู้ว่า ธปท งานหลักยังดูแลคุมเงินเฟ้อ ช่วยประคองเศรษฐกิจคงดอกเบี้ยยาวสิ้นปี เร่งแก้ปัญหาโครงสร้าง คุมสินเเชื่อ BNPL แก้ลำคนไทยใช้แต่ไม่ผ่อน สกัดหนี้เสียพุ่ง

title: SCB X tempers Gen 2 growth ambitions
desc: SCB X, the financial technology conglomerate and holding company of Siam Commercial Bank (SCB), expects to maintain single-digit loan growth for its Gen 2 businesses under a cautious strategy despite their strong growth potential.
title_cn: 暹罗商业银行金融科技部门调整增长策略
summary_cn: SCB X是暹罗商业银行（Siam Commercial Bank）的金融科技控股集团，其第二代业务原本增长潜力巨大。但该公司近日采取谨慎策略，预计个位数贷款增长率，暂缓激进扩张计划。这一举措反映了当前泰国金融市场的保守态度，旨在经济不确定环境下保持风险控制，优先确保财务稳定性。
desc_original: SCB X, the financial technology conglomerate and holding company of Siam Commercial Bank (SCB), expects to maintain single-digit loan growth for its Gen 2 businesses under a cautious strategy despite their strong growth potential.

title: Local sustainable bond issuance exceeds B1.1tn
desc: Thailand's sustainable bond market has surpassed 1.1 trillion baht in cumulative issuance, with regulators and market participants now turning their attention to transition finance as the next major growth driver, particularly for carbon-intensive industries seeking funding to support decarbonisation efforts.

summary_cn: 泰国可持续债券市场累计发行规模突破1.1万亿泰铢，标志着该市场的快速成长。监管机构和市场参与者现已将目光转向转型融资，作为下一波增长动力，重点支持碳密集产业的脱碳融资需求。
desc_original: Thailand's sustainable bond market has surpassed 1.1 trillion baht in cumulative issuance, with regulators and market participants now turning their attention to transition finance as the next major growth driver, particularly for carbon-intensive industries seeking funding to support decarbonisation efforts.

desc: Major Thai energy firms have divested their power plant assets to divert money to clean energy.

summary_cn: 泰国主要能源企业纷纷剥离传统火电等资产，将资金重心转向清洁能源领域。这波「大出售」反映了泰国能源行业向可持续发展战略性转变，符合全球能源转型大趋势。
desc_original: Major Thai energy firms have divested their power plant assets to divert money to clean energy.

title: Consumer property sentiment falls
desc: Consumer confidence has started to trend down again after peaking in 2022-23, prompting many consumers to delay purchases of big-ticket items such as homes and cars, according to property consultancy Terra Media and Consulting.

summary_cn: 根据房产咨询公司Terra Media and Consulting的数据，泰国消费者信心在2022-23年达到峰值后再次下滑，促使许多消费者推迟购买住房、汽车等大额商品。这一趋势反映出当前经济环境下消费者的谨慎态度。
desc_original: Consumer confidence has started to trend down again after peaking in 2022-23, prompting many consumers to delay purchases of big-ticket items such as homes and cars, according to property consultancy Terra Media and Consulting.

title: B17-45 electric train fare cap headed for cabinet nod
desc: The Transport Ministry is expected to submit a 17-45 baht electric train fare cap for cabinet approval next week, aiming to reduce people's travel costs.

summary_cn: 泰国交通部预计下周向内阁提交电动列车票价上限方案，拟将票价定在17-45铢（Baht），旨在降低民众出行成本。该政策有望推动首都曼谷的公共交通优化，缓解居民的日常交通开支。
desc_original: The Transport Ministry is expected to submit a 17-45 baht electric train fare cap for cabinet approval next week, aiming to reduce people's travel costs.

title: Chadchart denies BMA patronage claim
desc: Recently resigned Bangkok governor Chadchart Sittipunt has denied allegations of corruption, patronage networks, and the sale of civil service positions within the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) during his tenure.
title_cn: 曼谷前市长乍叻否认徇私舞弊指控
summary_cn: 近日辞任的曼谷市长乍叻·西体槃（Chadchart Sittipunt）否认有关其任期内曼谷大都会管理局（BMA）存在腐败、裙带关系和非法出售公务员职位的指控。这些指控涉及严重的廉政问题，相关调查可能进一步发展。
desc_original: Recently resigned Bangkok governor Chadchart Sittipunt has denied allegations of corruption, patronage networks, and the sale of civil service positions within the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration (BMA) during his tenure.

title: Govt warns on co-pay fraud scams
desc: The government has warned merchants and beneficiaries of the "Thais Help Thais Plus" economic relief scheme not to exchange programme benefits for cash.
title_cn: 政府警示「泰国人帮泰国人Plus」计划防诈风险
summary_cn: 泰国政府向「泰国人帮泰国人Plus」（Thais Help Thais Plus）经济救济计划的商户和受益人发布警告，提醒不要非法兑现计划福利换取现金。该计划存在诈骗风险，参与者应谨慎防范利用该计划实施的各类欺诈活动。
desc_original: The government has warned merchants and beneficiaries of the "Thais Help Thais Plus" economic relief scheme not to exchange programme benefits for cash.

title: River network asks China ambassador to visit river
desc: A northern river protection network has invited China's ambassador to Thailand to visit Chiang Rai on World Environment Day and hear concerns over toxic river pollution linked to cross-border mining activities.
title_cn: 河流保护组织邀请中国大使访清莱 Chiang Rai 处理跨界污染问题
summary_cn: 泰国北部河流保护网络在世界环境日邀请中国驻泰大使访问清莱，就跨境采矿导致的河流污染问题表达关切。此举旨在通过高层外交对话，推动泰中在湄公河流域水资源保护与环保治理方面的深度合作，共同应对跨界污染挑战。
desc_original: A northern river protection network has invited China's ambassador to Thailand to visit Chiang Rai on World Environment Day and hear concerns over toxic river pollution linked to cross-border mining activities.

title: Govt cites AI in hatching staff cutbacks
desc: The government plans to downsize its civil service through an early retirement scheme while increasing pay for remaining staff, as the administration accelerates its transition towards digital governance and artificial intelligence-driven public services.
title_cn: 泰政府借助人工智能加速推进公务员精简改革
summary_cn: 泰国政府推行提前退休方案精简公务员队伍，同时提高留任人员薪酬，加快推进数字化治理和人工智能驱动的公共服务转型。这一改革旨在通过科技赋能提升行政效率，同时保障关键岗位人员待遇。此举体现了泰国政府适应数字时代治理需求、优化公共服务的意图。
desc_original: The government plans to downsize its civil service through an early retirement scheme while increasing pay for remaining staff, as the administration accelerates its transition towards digital governance and artificial intelligence-driven public services.

title: Border move 'saps trust'
desc: Cambodia's decision to initiate compulsory conciliation proceedings under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (Unclos) has undermined trust and complicated efforts to reach a negotiated settlement on overlapping maritime claims, Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow said.
title_cn: 柬埔寨启动海上争端仲裁程序「削弱互信」
summary_cn: 柬埔寨根据《联合国海洋法公约》启动强制性调解程序，就重叠海上主权要求寻求国际仲裁。泰国外交部长西哈萨克指出，此举严重损害了两国信任，复杂化了通过谈判解决争端的努力。此举暴露两国在边界问题上的深层分歧，可能威胁地区和平与外交稳定，凸显东南亚地缘政治的敏感性。
desc_original: Cambodia's decision to initiate compulsory conciliation proceedings under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea (Unclos) has undermined trust and complicated efforts to reach a negotiated settlement on overlapping maritime claims, Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow said.

title: Ukraine calls for deeper economic, political links
desc: Ukraine has called for Thailand to broaden cooperation beyond humanitarian assistance, urging greater engagement in investment, political dialogue and regional diplomacy as it seeks international support during its war with Russia.
title_cn: 乌克兰呼吁泰国深化经济政治合作
summary_cn: 乌克兰敦促泰国扩大合作范围，超越人道主义援助，在投资、政治对话和地区外交等领域加强参与。作为俄乌战争中寻求国际支持的重要举措，乌克兰希望获得泰国更广泛的经济和政治承诺，以增强其国际地位和战争韧性。这反映出乌克兰对东南亚关键国家支持的重视。
desc_original: Ukraine has called for Thailand to broaden cooperation beyond humanitarian assistance, urging greater engagement in investment, political dialogue and regional diplomacy as it seeks international support during its war with Russia.

title: Phuket airport rolls out e-gates to cut queues
desc: Phuket airport will introduce automated passport control gates on June 13 to ease congestion and improve processing efficiency during peak travel periods.
title_cn: 普吉 Phuket 机场启用电子通关门加速旅客过检
summary_cn: 普吉国际机场将于6月13日启用自动护照检查通道，以缓解高峰期拥堵并提高通关效率。此举特别针对旅游旺季设计，能够显著减少旅客排队等待时间，优化国际旅客进出境体验。自动通关系统的推出有助于提升普吉作为热门目的地的服务质量，吸引更多国际游客。
desc_original: Phuket airport will introduce automated passport control gates on June 13 to ease congestion and improve processing efficiency during peak travel periods.

title: Thai Police rescue Chinese student trapped in elaborate ‘Virtual Kidnapping’ scam
desc: Thai police safely located a 21-year-old Chinese student after scammers manipulated her into staging her own kidnapping and demanded 12.5 million baht from her family. BANGKOK, Thailand – Thai police have rescued a 21-year-old Chinese student who was manipulated by an international scam network into staging her own kidnapping as part of an elaborate “virtual kidnapping” scheme aimed at extorting millions of baht from her family. The case was announced at a press conference by Pol Gen Thatchai Pitaneelaboot and senior officers from the Central Investigation Bureau , June 3. (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({}); According to investigators, the victim’s father in Hong Kong received threatening messages via WeChat from an unidentified man claiming that his daughter had been kidnapped. title: Thailand rejects ‘Build Now, Pay Later’ deal for high-speed rail as CP pressured to find new solution
desc: The government has ruled out changing the contract for Thailand’s delayed three-airport high-speed rail project to a “build now, pay later” model, leaving the CP-led consortium under pressure to propose a new path forward. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s government has rejected a proposed change to the contract for the long-delayed high-speed rail project linking Don Mueang, Suvarnabhumi, and U-Tapao airports, increasing pressure on the CP-led consortium to present an alternative plan if it wishes to continue with the project. The 224.5-billion-baht rail project, one of the flagship infrastructure developments of the Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC), has faced years of delays amid disputes over financing arrangements and contract amendments. According to Anan Phonimdaeng, acting governor of the State Railway of Thailand (SRT), the government’s current position is clear: it does not support revising the contract to allow a “build now, pay later” payment structure that would alter previously agreed financial terms. title: Wife reveals ICU battle as lightning-struck rider on Bangkok overpass slowly recovers
desc: The rider remains in ICU but is steadily improving after being struck by lightning on a Bangkok overpass, with doctors continuing close monitoring and further tests to assess his recovery. BANGKOK, Thailand – The wife of a food delivery rider struck by lightning on an elevated expressway in Bangkok on June 3, says his condition is steadily improving, although he remains in intensive care under close medical supervision. The rider, Piya, was severely injured after a lightning strike hit his motorcycle while he was travelling on the Ratchavipha elevated road on Vibhavadi Rangsit Road toward Ratchayothin intersection in Chatuchak district. The strike reportedly hit the center of his helmet, burning the surface, while a metal necklace he was wearing snapped and left burn marks on his neck. title: Two suspects arrested after Pattaya teen girls reveal alleged human trafficking operation
desc: Anti-trafficking police raided a karaoke venue in Sattahip as part of an investigation into allegations of human trafficking involving underage girls. PATTAYA, Thailand – Anti-human trafficking police have arrested two suspects following a raid on a karaoke venue in Sattahip, Chonburi, as part of an investigation into alleged human trafficking involving underage girls, June 2. The operation was ordered by Pol Maj Gen Witthaya Sriprasertphap and carried out by officers from Thailand’s Anti-Human Trafficking Division. Authorities arrested a 43-year-old woman and a 37-year-old man under warrants issued by the Criminal Court on charges related to conspiracy to commit human trafficking offenses. The arrests took place at a karaoke establishment in Sattahip district. The investigation began after anti-trafficking officers, working alongside the International Protection Alliance (IPA) and Our Rescue Thailand Foundation, assisted two teenage girls and placed them under protection and rehabilitation programs. title: When a warning beep becomes an insult, foreigners reflect on Pattaya’s horn problem
desc: What should be a simple safety warning on Pattaya’s roads can too easily escalate into anger and confrontation, raising concerns about how quickly minor traffic disputes can turn into road-rage incidents. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – The reaction from readers following the recent Pattaya road-rage case involving two motorcyclists and a foreign driver reveals something troubling about life on Thailand’s roads: many people have come to accept that a simple tap of the horn can escalate into confrontation. The incident itself was alarming enough. What allegedly began with a horn blast ended with a pursuit through the city, accusations of aggressive behavior, and questions about alcohol consumption. Yet the comments posted by readers may be even more revealing than the incident itself. Some argued that honking is a normal safety tool used worldwide. Others insisted that in Thailand, particularly in Pattaya, drivers should avoid using the horn except in emergencies because many people interpret it as a personal insult. title: SET rally builds momentum as investors eye laggards and 1,620 breakout target
desc: Analysts see Thailand’s stock market extending its rally toward 1,620, driven by sector rotation into undervalued laggard stocks across retail, healthcare, utilities, and tourism. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s stock market rally is expected to continue, with analysts also anticipating a gradual rotation into laggard stocks that have fallen below fundamental value, driven by a mean-reversion effect across key sectors including retail, utilities, hospitals focused on foreign patients, and tourism-related stocks. Market strategist from Bualuang Securities, Piriyapon Kongwanich said the Thai equity market continues to show strength despite slower economic growth, supported by structural drivers, global investment cycles, and sector-specific recovery themes, with the SET Index still seen having room to move toward the 1,620 level. He added that investor interest is expected to broaden into underperforming sectors, particularly retail, small power producers (SPP), healthcare operators serving international patients, and tourism stocks, as valuations adjust toward fundamentals. title: Thailand’s dominant Covid strain not more severe, DDC says
desc: Thailand’s dominant Covid strain not more severe, DDC says Legacy Thailand’s Department of Disease Control confirmed today, June 3, that the Covid-19 NB.1.8.1 variant has remained the country’s dominant strain since mid-2025, but officials have found no evidence that it causes more severe illness than earlier variants. DDC director-general Dr Montien Kanasawat said the Ministry of Public Health continues to monitor Covid-19 and changes in the SARS-CoV-2 virus through the Digital Disease Surveillance system, event-based monitoring, and laboratory surveillance. Data from the DDS system on June 2 recorded 4,156 Covid-19 cases and one death. The highest number of infections was found among people aged 30 to 39, followed by those aged 60 and above, and people aged 20 to 29. Photo via DDC Montien said cases have risen seasonally over the past month, but the number remains below the five-year median. Variant surveillance by the Department of Medical Sciences between January 1, 2025, and April 23, 2026, found NB.1.8.1 accounted for 50.95% of detected strains in Thailand. title: Spanish nationals linked to Krabi pool villa nominee probe
desc: Spanish nationals linked to Krabi pool villa nominee probe Legacy Krabi officials raided a luxury pool villa in Nong Thale subdistrict, Mueang Krabi district, yesterday, June 2, as part of an investigation into suspected nominee shareholding involving foreign business operators. Krabi Governor Angkoon Silatewakul led the operation after officials obtained a Krabi Provincial Court warrant to search the villa, which sits on more than 1 rai of land. Officials said the villa business was registered as a joint investment between one Thai national and two Spanish nationals. Photo via DailyNews Investigators found the Spanish operators allegedly controlled the business, raising concerns that the Thai shareholder may have been used as a nominee to avoid legal restrictions on foreign business activity . Krabi land officials have reportedly filed a complaint with Ao Nang police for legal proceedings. The raid also found the villa had allegedly been rented out daily to foreign tourists without a hotel business licence under the Hotel Act 2004. Officials are also checking whether the operator reported foreign guests to Immigration as required under Section 38 of the Immigration Act 1979. Photo

title: 泰国在列！美国拟对60个经济体加征进口关税
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据泰国媒体报道，美国总统特朗普政府再度祭出贸易保护措施。美国贸易代表办公室（USTR）日前提议，对来自全球60个经济体的进口商品加征10%至12.5%的额外关税，理由是相关国家和地区未能有效遏制强迫劳动产品进入国际供应链，对美国贸易构成不公平竞争。 据路透社报道，该提案于6月2日公布，是美国依据《1974年贸易法》第301条款针对所谓“不公平贸易行为”展开调查后的最新措施，也是特朗普政府在部分紧急关税措施遭美国法院否决后，寻求重新建立贸易壁垒的重要行动之一。 根据USTR公布的方案，加拿大、厄瓜多尔、欧盟、印度尼西亚、墨西哥及巴基斯坦等6个经济体的相关进口商品将面临10%的额外关税；其余54个被列入调查名单的经济体则可能被征收12.5%的额外关税。 美国贸易代表Jamieson Greer表示，美国重要贸易伙伴未能有效解决强迫劳动产品流入市场的问题，这种情况不可接受，将导致美国劳工在全球市场竞争中处于不利地位。 在此次调查名单中，共有54个经济体被认定未能有效建立和执行禁止强迫劳动产品进口的措施，包括中国、印度、日本、韩国、新加坡、越南、马来西亚、泰国、英国、澳大利亚、巴西、沙特阿拉伯等国家和地区。 泰国此次也被列入名单之中。若相关提案最终实施，部分泰国产品出口美国时可能面临额外12.5%的关税压力，对出口竞争力造成影响。 与此同时，USTR也提出针对纺织服装行业的特殊机制，允许一定数量的纺织品和成衣产品以较低税率进入美国市场，但具体配额及税率尚未公布。 不过，美国方面表示，能源产品、稀土矿产及部分金属、牛肉、咖啡、部分水果和蔬菜、药品、有机化学品以及飞机零部件等商品将被排除在新增关税范围之外。 此外，USTR已宣布就该提案展开公众意见征询，意见征集期将持续至7月6日，并计划于7月7日举行公开听证会。最终措施是否实施，以及具体税率和适用商品范围，仍有待美国政府进一步确定。 分析认为，若新一轮关税措施正式落地，不仅将影响美国与多个贸易伙伴之间的经贸关系，也可能进一步加剧全球供应链紧张局势，并对包括泰国在内的出口导向型经济体带来新的挑战。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：matichon） The post 泰国在列！美国拟对60个经济体加征进口关税 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Three Myanmar nationals killed in Tak farm drone explosion
desc: Three Myanmar nationals killed in Tak farm drone explosion Legacy A drone explosion near the Thai-Myanmar border in Tak killed three Myanmar chilli farm workers, including an 11 year old child, and seriously injured two others yesterday, June 2, after an explosive device reportedly crossed from Myanmar into Thailand. Officers from Phop Phra Police Station, soldiers, and security officials inspected a chilli farm near the Thai-Myanmar border in Wale subdistrict, Phop Phra district, Tak province, at 4pm. Police found a medium-sized explosive drone, similar to a glider, lying mostly intact beside a tree. About 10 metres away, officers found one blast crater in the chilli farm. Photo via Amarin TV A 25 year old Myanmar woman who worked as a chilli picker died at the scene. Four other workers were seriously injured and taken to the hospital. Two of them, the woman’s 37 year old husband and 11 year old son, later died from their injuries. The other two injured workers, a 31 year old man and 30 year old woman, were transferred to Mae Sot Hospital. title: Thailand has the largest freelancer gender pay gap in the world, women charge 51.7% less
desc: Thailand has the largest freelancer gender pay gap in the world, women charge 51.7% less Legacy Thailand has the largest freelancer gender pay gap of any country with sufficient data for analysis, according to a new global study. Women freelancing in Thailand charge an average of US$30.68 (approximately 1,080 baht) per hour, compared to US$63.57 (approximately 2,240 baht) for men. That is a gap of 51.7%, the widest recorded across the 54 countries covered in the research. The findings come from the Global Freelancer Pay Gap Report by Remitly for Freelancers , which analysed hourly rates from 58,261 freelancers across major work categories on Upwork. The methodology used name-based gender inference with a confidence threshold of 90%, meaning each determination reflects the most likely gender associated with a freelancer’s profile rather than their personal identification. Section of the freelancer pay gap table from Remitly A gap that stands out even globally The global average freelancer pay gap sits at 19%, with women charging US$31.33 per hour against men’s US$38.66. Thailand’s 51.7% disparity is nearly three times that figure, placing it well ahead of the secon
title_cn: 泰国自由职业者性别薪酬差距全球最大 女性时薪低五成
summary_cn: 根据汇款服务公司Remitly发布的全球自由职业者薪酬差距报告，泰国的性别薪酬差距居全球之首。该报告基于Upwork平台上58261名自由职业者的数据分析，泰国女性自由职业者平均时薪为30.68美元（约1080泰铢），男性平均时薪为63.57美元（约2240泰铢），差距高达51.7%，远超全球平均水平19%。

title: Health insurance in Thailand may have just got more expensive
desc: Health insurance in Thailand may have just got more expensive Legacy When your health insurance renewal in Thailand lands and there’s an unfamiliar clause about a 30% co-payment on next year’s medical bills, that’s not a mistake or a typo. It’s the result of a regulatory change that came into effect in March 2025, and 2026 is the first full renewal cycle where it shows up in policyholder documents. Most expats on local Thai health insurance plans didn’t see it coming, and some still don’t know it’s there. What the OIC co-payment rule means for your coverage Thailand’s Office of Insurance Commission (OIC) introduced a mandatory co-payment clause for individual health insurance policies issued from March 2025 onward, and the rule works on two separate thresholds. The first covers six specific conditions: headache, influenza, diarrhoea, muscle inflammation, stomach acid, and gastroesophageal reflux. File three or more claims for any of these that total more than 200% of your annual premium, and a 30% co-payment applies to all your medical costs the following policy year. title_cn: 泰国健康保险新规生效 患者明年共付额提高至30%
summary_cn: 泰国保险委员会（OIC）从2025年3月开始实施新的强制共同保险条款，2026年是首个完整续约周期。针对头痛、流感、腹泻、肌肉炎症、胃酸和胃食管反流等六种常见疾病，若年度索赔超过保费的200%，次年所有医疗费用需负担30%的共付。这一变化将显著影响在泰外国人的健康保险成本和医疗覆盖计划。

title: Koh Samet hotel apologises to attempted rape victim but removes statement
desc: Koh Samet hotel apologises to attempted rape victim but removes statement Legacy A Koh Samet hotel at the centre of allegations involving an attempted rape and attempted murder issued a public apology and acknowledged shortcomings in its security arrangements before later deleting the statement from its Facebook page. The development follows claims made by a Thai woman on June 2 that her friend narrowly escaped an attempted rape and murder during a stay at a hotel on Koh Samet in Rayong province. According to the woman, the suspect entered her friend’s room before trying to sexually assault and murder the victim. The victim’s boyfriend rescued her in time, but the suspect managed to flee. The woman criticised the hotel’s response, claiming there were no security guards on duty and that assistance was delayed. She later confirmed on social media that the suspect was arrested. However, she did not provide further details regarding the legal proceedings. The woman criticised the hotel’s response, claiming there were no security guards on duty and that assistance was delayed. She later confirmed on social media that the suspect was arrested. However, she did not provide further details regarding the legal proceedings. title: 日本游客遭网约车司机殴打 泰国旅游部长发声
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 泰国旅游与体育部长素拉萨就日本游客在曼谷阿索克地区遭网约车司机殴打一事表示，旅游与体育部对此事件高度重视。目前已协调相关部门密切跟进事实调查及案件处理进展，确保受害者获得公正对待。同时重申，泰国始终将来自世界各地游客的安全与信心置于最高优先位置。 素拉萨表示，此类事件属于个别人员行为，与政府推动高质量旅游发展的政策背道而驰，也不能反映泰国旅游服务行业的整体状况。长期以来，政府部门与私营机构一直持续合作，不断提升服务标准，并加强保障游客安全的各项措施。 为此，旅游与体育部已强调加强与旅游警察局、陆路运输厅、网约车平台运营商及相关单位之间的协同合作，进一步完善筛查、检查及监管机制，确保公共交通服务提供者具备相应标准及服务意识，特别是在重点旅游区域。 素拉萨指出，政府和旅游与体育部将继续推动泰国迈向“Trusted Thailand（可信赖的泰国）”目标，打造高品质、安全且对游客友好的旅游目的地。政府将通过主动式游客保障措施、便利化服务以及全方位提升服务标准，持续增强全球游客对泰国旅游的信心。 他表示，旅游与体育部呼吁所有旅游服务业者以及广大民众共同做好东道主，携手维护国家良好形象，让游客对泰国产生美好印象，并对赴泰旅游保持信心。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；） The post 日本游客遭网约车司机殴打 泰国旅游部长发声 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: 泰国人气CP“TanYada”官宣结束合作
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 6月2日，泰国三台发布官方声明，宣布旗下两位新生代演员Tan Duangkaew和Yada Narilya经友好沟通已达成共识，决定结束双方的合作关系。三台称，电视台衷心感谢各位粉丝一直以来对Tan和Yada的喜爱、鼓励与支持，也希望大家在今后也一如既往地关注并支持她们各自的作品。 随后，Tan在IG上发文表示，谢谢所有人的爱和支持，有大家在的每一刻，都是她心中最美好的回忆和一直以来前进的动力，谢谢粉丝从第一天起就陪在她身边，未来的演艺路上她会继续努力提升自己的能力。同时，Tan也为Yada加油，她说，不管Yada选择走哪条路，都希望能一起更好地成长。 Yada同样发文感谢各位长辈一直以来给她的机会。她说，关于她和Tan不再继续搭档这件事，是她做出的决定，但她心里对大家的感激从未减少过，谢谢大家从始至终对她的支持和陪伴。 （编译：KA；来源：9entertain） The post 泰国人气CP“TanYada”官宣结束合作 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国人气CP「TanYada」官宣结束合作
summary_cn: Tan Duangkaew和Yada Narilya是泰国三台旗下的新生代演员，因组成人气CP「TanYada」而备受关注。6月2日，泰国三台官方声明宣布两位演员经友好沟通已达成共识，决定结束合作关系。电视台表示衷心感谢粉丝一直以来的支持和关注。随后两位演员分别在社交媒体发文感谢粉丝的陪伴和电视台的机会，表示各自将继续在演艺事业中努力成长。Tan同时为Yada的未来送上祝福。
